category_title: Low-achieving students using superficial compensation strategies
scenario_title: Superficial modeling and explanation stagnation in algebraic word problems
minimal_context: Meral is working with her peer Adile to find and explain an algebraic expression for the pump operation time in the Open air bath problem.

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: Let's look at the Open air bath problem. What algebraic expression did you write for the pump operation time?

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: Ehm, I have 7 times 12 minus x?

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: Can you tell me more about why you wrote that?

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: Because, there we have. Ehm, for good weather, it is open 7 days, and for rainy days it stays closed. That is why I have 7 times ehm. … No …. Yes. 7 times 12 and then minus x.

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: Please explain the meaning of the numbers and variables in your expression.

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: Ehm, because here, we have… Ehm… That is, no. If –no. For good weather it is open seven days a week. Ehm (takes a 5 second break) well how shall I explain that? (takes a 16 second break) [to Adile] You continue, I will read again.

dialogue_combined:
TUTOR: Let's look at the Open air bath problem. What algebraic expression did you write for the pump operation time?

STUDENT: Ehm, I have 7 times 12 minus x?

TUTOR: Can you tell me more about why you wrote that?

STUDENT: Because, there we have. Ehm, for good weather, it is open 7 days, and for rainy days it stays closed. That is why I have 7 times ehm. … No …. Yes. 7 times 12 and then minus x.

TUTOR: Please explain the meaning of the numbers and variables in your expression.

STUDENT: Ehm, because here, we have… Ehm… That is, no. If –no. For good weather it is open seven days a week. Ehm (takes a 5 second break) well how shall I explain that? (takes a 16 second break) [to Adile] You continue, I will read again.

task.content: Working on the 'Open air bath problem' which asks for an algebraic expression for pump operation time given rainy days (x).
task.learning_goal: Building a complete situation or problem model to find an algebraic expression.

context.materials: Cards with numbers and variables on a table, Word Problem Cracker (WPC) scaffolding tool
context.social_setting: Working with a peer (Adile) and interacting with a tutor

challenging_behavior_trigger.condition: When attempting to explain her mathematical expression for the 'Open air bath problem' to the tutor.
challenging_behavior_trigger.observable_behavior: Explanation stagnates after reciting the first sentence about 7 days from the text. Takes a 5 sec break, asks 'well how shall I explain that?', takes a 16 sec break, and tells peer 'You continue, I will read again.'
challenging_behavior_trigger.internal_state: Trying hard, but implicitly applies compensation strategy without building a complete situation or problem model.
related_quotes: Ehm, because here, we have… Ehm… That is, no. If –no. For good [weather] it is open seven days a week. Ehm [5 sec break] well how shall I explain that? [16 sec break] [to Adile] You continue, I will read again.

behavior_patterns.condition: When writing or modifying algebraic expressions.
behavior_patterns.observable_behavior: Orders numbers according to the order of numbers in the text (e.g., writes 7 · (x − 12), corrects to 7 · (12 − x), then modifies to 7 · x − 12) without referring to the meaning of the quantitative operation and relations.
behavior_patterns.internal_state: Cannot overcome the obstacle of superficial modeling.
related_quotes: Ehm, I have 7 times 12 minus x?
Because, there we have. Ehm, for good weather, it is open 7 days, and for rainy days it stays closed. That is why I have 7 times ehm. … No …. Yes. 7 times 12 and then minus x.

behavior_patterns.condition: When asked to explain the meaning of the numbers and variables in the expression.
behavior_patterns.observable_behavior: Attributes a meaning to 7 and 12, but does not refer to the meaning of x nor to the question of the task that includes the rainy days. Expresses uncertainty about why numbers were included.
behavior_patterns.internal_state: Has built a partial situation model without proceeding to the problem model; neither focuses on the meaning of the underlying quantity nor on their relation.
related_quotes: Ehm. Well, for good weather, seven days a week are open. Then I have written 7 here. And ehm… ehm, well the pump for the water runs on open days for 12 hours. Hence 7 times 12.
Thus, it runs 12 hours long. I don’t know, I have it anyway.
